text: Healthy living means taking care of your whole self, not just your body. A balanced diet with fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and enough protein gives you energy and helps you stay strong. Regular exercise, like walking, cycling, or yoga, is also important. It keeps your heart healthy and improves your mood. Getting enough sleep is equally vital—aim for seven to nine hours each night. This allows your body and mind to rest and recover. Don’t forget your mental health, either. Managing stress through hobbies or talking with friends makes a big difference. Finally, a good work-life balance is key. Make time for both your responsibilities and activities you enjoy.
